case_title: POON, GEORGE vs. SCHWEGLER, ALEXANDRA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POON, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHWEGLER, ALEXANDRA IOANNOU, KONSTANTINOS AKA KOSTA IOANNO AKA KONSTANTINOS LOANNOU THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 19 PEARL STREET, UNIT #2, LEASE FORFEITED, -INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
